name: Recover Transponder
brief: Search several locations for a hidden device and carry it back to safety.
objective: Locate the true transponder and escape over Player A's killzone edge while carrying it.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly across rooms containing objective markers, with intervening terrain in control range when viewed from Player A's drop zone.

rules.name: Objective Markers
rules.summary: Set up three objective markers as shown on the mission map.

rules.name: Locate Item
rules.summary: When picking up an unresolved marker, roll D3. The item is found if the result is higher than the number of other markers remaining; otherwise remove that marker.

rules.name: Escape
rules.summary: Player operatives can leave over Player A's killzone edge.

victory.win: A player operative carrying the objective marker escapes.
